## Summary

## Type of Change

- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Rust implementation
- [ ] Specification
- [ ] RFC
- [ ] Tooling

## Honesty Checklist

- [ ] Implemented behavior is backed by code or tests.
- [ ] Planned behavior is labeled as planned.
- [ ] Research ideas are labeled as research.
- [ ] No unsupported benchmark, security, or scientific claims were added.

## Tests

```text
cargo test
```
